nasb.text: But if anyone does not provide for his own, and especially for those of his household, he has denied the faith and is worse than an unbeliever.

esv.text: But if anyone does not provide for his relatives, and especially for members of his household, he has denied the faith and is worse than an unbeliever.

cnv.text: 人若不看顧自己的人，尤其不看顧自己一家的人，就是背棄信仰，比不信的人還壞。

ccb.text: 谁不照顾自己的亲属，尤其是不照顾自己的家人，就是违背真道，比不信的人还坏。

csbs.text: 如果有人不敬重属自己的人，尤其是家里的人，他就否定了信仰，比不信的人更坏。
